payload.decision: Brain should treat Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection, while Brain DB remains the source of truth.
payload.intent: To define the architectural roles and relationships between Brain, Cognee, and Brain DB within the personal memory system.

memory_cards.statement: Brain should treat Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection.
Brain DB remains the source of truth.

details: Extracted architectural decision regarding Brain, Cognee, and Brain DB roles.
